rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid clauses instead of adding architecture
Align helper declaration types with expression types to resolve type mismatches
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Remove guarantees with type <error> or unresolved references
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only valid AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Remove invalid clauses instead of adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool
Comparison expressions are bool; integer literals and arithmetic are int; real literals and arithmetic are real
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix validator diagnostics
Do not use unresolved references or invalid helpers in guarantees
Do not change unrelated architecture during repair
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
